name: Mental Health and Substance Use Disorder Diagnosis Codes
description: ICD-10-CM codes for mental health conditions and substance use disorders. Used for denominator identification in follow-up after hospitalization for mental illness (FUH), follow-up after ED visit for mental illness (FUM), and related behavioral health measures.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets

codes.description: Manic episode without psychotic symptoms, unspecified
Bipolar disorder, current episode manic without psychotic features, unspecified
Bipolar disorder, current episode depressed, mild or moderate severity, unspecified
Major depressive disorder, single episode, unspecified
